subject: [IETF_ACTN_TOOLS] First upload of the Feature code of one of the ACTN tool chain  in the new repo
commit_message:
[IETF_ACTN_TOOLS]
First upload of the Feature code of one of the ACTN tool chain
 in the new repo

The code of this repos deals with "ACTN Topo Generator" tool
It provides the features to design multi-domain OTN networks graphically
and automatically generate ACTN topology data in JSON format that would
be further used by another tool "ACTN PNC Simulator".

It is used by the use cases of transport private line and transport slicing.

Issue-ID: INT-1857
Change-Id: I075bf66da635365260bfc52b0fe13ac3cb69c3c6
Signed-off-by: Jun Sun <john.sunjun@huawei.com>

John Sunjun: Could you please rebase this PR onto https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/integration/ietf-actn-tools/+/117841/1? Go to "REBASE" at the top -> "Rebase on a specific change, ref, or commit (breaks relation chain)", paste b08b5f3 there. This will kick js linter (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ci-management/+/117843) once ci commit merged.

Normally I could rebase myself but ACLs for this repo seem still not to be set up as they should.

Patch Set 1:

Could you be a little be more explicit on the title and description
I understand that it is the first upload of the code in the repo...but people outside the project are not aware of the topic so I would suggest something like

[IETF_ACTN_TOOLS] First upload of the Feature code in the new repo

The code of this repos deals with ...
It provides the features ..
It is used by the use cases ...

Ref: [Official/Wiki links]
